title: Aiuidun Capybara Plush with 6 Cute Babies Capybara Stuffed Animals,a Bag of Capybara Animal Snack Pillow,Super Soft Capybara Plushie Doll Pillow for Baby Boys Girls Toys(Brown)
features: Capybara Plush:There are 6 small capybara stuffed animal plush dolls in each cute capybara throw pillow. A bag of soft stuffed toys, so cute! Open the zipper, you will not only get a cute capybara throw pillow, also you can get 6 lovely capybara animal dolls.

Capybara Stuffed Animal Snack Pillow:our capybara stuffed animal plush pillow is designed with a transparent window, so you can clearly see the small capybara plushie inside; The zipper design is convenient for you to take out the small capybara plushie, you can also create a snack bag for yourself by filling with your favorite snacks

Capybara Plush Pillow: can be the best lumbar pillow or back cushion for sleeping, reading, watching television, studying, and sleepy nap time,and also the most comfortable sleeping pillow for a sweet sleep on bed.
High Quality Materials:Made of high quality plush fabric, which is fluffy and soft, with a delicate and smooth touch,fill PP cotton lining, shaped and will not be deformed, comfortable hand feeling.

Sweet Gifts:Funny capybara plush which are suitable for you to send to your family numbers, friend, boyfriend, girlfriend, baby, lover,on Birthdays, Christmas, Children's Day, Valentine's Day, Halloween, Thanksgiving, and other memorial days.
